summary: Data Science Engineer with hands-on experience building and deploying production-grade ML and GenAI systems, including RAG pipelines, LLM-integrated applications, and document processing workflows. Skilled in Python, prompt engineering, vector search, and end-to-end ML workflows from data preparation and labeling through model training, evaluation, and cloud deployment. Experienced taking AI solutions from development to production using containerized, scalable infrastructure with CI/CD automation.

skills.ml: LLMs, Prompt Engineering, RAG, Fine-tuning, LangChain, HuggingFace, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Deepgram API, XGBoost, DistilBERT, YOLO, scikit-learn, SHAP, Captum, NumPy, Pandas
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Pinecone (vector database), PostgreSQL, Supabase, Railway, Vercel, GCP
skills.frontend: Next.js, React, FastAPI, Express, REST APIs

experience.title: Deep Learning Intern
bullets: Built a data augmentation pipeline using NumPy and Pandas, scaling the training dataset from a few hundred to 10,000+ images and manually re-annotating 500+ edge cases to support structured labeling and tagging workflows; accuracy improved from 65% to 85.4% on held-out evaluation data.

Developed a YOLO-based object detection model in Python to detect and classify industrial pipe inventory from warehouse images, improving accuracy by 30% and eliminating a fully manual counting process.
Containerized the model with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes for horizontal scaling of model inference, enabling the team to handle variable load without code changes.
Designed normalized relational database schemas in SQL to store image metadata and inference results, enabling cross-team queries on model performance and inventory trends.

projects.name: AI Interview Engine
projects.subtitle: Voice-First Candidate Screening Platform
projects.stack: Next.js, Express, Claude Sonnet/Haiku, Deepgram, Supabase, Railway, Vercel
bullets: Built an automated document ingestion pipeline (PDF parsing, Claude Haiku, MD5 deduplication caching) handling unstructured resume data, and a post-interview evaluation system scoring candidates across 4 dimensions with advance/hold/reject output; deployed full-stack on Railway, Vercel, and Supabase (PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security and Magic Link authentication) with Brevo SMTP for transactional email automation.

Designed a multi-turn conversational AI engine with dynamic context injection: the LLM receives each candidate's parsed resume before the session and generates targeted, role-specific follow-up questions in real time, demonstrating applied prompt engineering for structured LLM-based workflows.

Engineered a real-time voice pipeline integrating Deepgram Nova-2 (speech-to-text) and Aura (text-to-speech) with Claude Sonnet 4.6 (large language model), achieving 4-5s end-to-end latency per conversational turn and replacing human interviewers for initial candidate screening.

projects.name: CodeSyntax AI
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack RAG Developer Assistant
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js, LangChain, Pinecone, Docker, GitHub Actions
bullets: Built a production RAG pipeline using GPT-4o-mini with semantic search over Python Docs, RealPython, and StackOverflow, indexed in Pinecone via OpenAI vector embeddings, covering the full workflow from document chunking and embedding generation to vector database integration and retrieval.

Implemented an LLM-based query intent classifier and result re-ranker by source authority, plus multi-turn conversation support via LangChain chat-history condensing, both measurably reducing off-topic responses.

Maintained 35+ pytest unit tests and a 55-question domain evaluation set; GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline builds the Docker image and deploys to Railway (API) and Vercel (frontend) on every merge to main.

projects.name: AuthentiText
projects.subtitle: AI-Generated Text Detection Engine
projects.stack: Python, XGBoost, DistilBERT, HuggingFace, GCP, Docker
bullets: Trained a weighted ensemble model combining XGBoost (21 hand-crafted linguistic features: perplexity, burstiness, lexical density) with a fine-tuned DistilBERT transformer, achieving 99.1% F1 and 99.96% AUROC on held-out test data.

Conducted systematic model evaluation across four architectures (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, DistilBERT) using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance; integrated Captum token-level attribution heatmaps for explainable AI (XAI).

Trained on the merged HC3 corpus spanning Wikipedia, Reddit, medicine, and finance domains, handling structured and unstructured text data; deployed as a publicly accessible ML inference app on HuggingFace Spaces.
